_comment: ADOPT: the Institutional BrainKit manifest (Loom 2.0-rc.10). This template lands adopt-pending — the installer copies it but NEVER invents or approves institutional content. Generate a real draft with the brainkit-init skill against your APPROVED institutional sources, have accountable owners review and approve it, then seal the digests. Owners and approvals must resolve to humans in docs/governance/identities.json. Section and package digests are computed from the section files (node scripts/brainkit-check.mjs --seal writes them). status stays 'draft' until accountable owners approve — only an approved, effective, digest-consistent BrainKit satisfies a compiled change. Say 'institutionally conformant', never 'regulatorily compliant'.

owners.identity: ADOPT: <registry-id of the accountable owner for institutional identity>
